description: Birth certificate pipeline: input manifest plus the exact JSON shape the vision model returns for document_type birth_certificate (schemas/birth_certificate.schema.json). Three groups: birth_certificate (office/registration metadata), ids (national numbers), personal_and_other (names and demographics).

pipeline_manifest.documentation: Edit paths to choose which scans to run.
Edit paths to choose which scans to run.

field_groups.birth_certificate: Titles, serial (رقم مسلسل), registration number/date (رقم القيد / تاريخ القيد), issue date, health office (م. صحة), civil registry (س. مدني), issuing authority, form line, software version, barcode notes.
field_groups.ids: Child / father / mother national IDs (الرقم القومي). Extra printed numbers go in other_ids as {label_ar, value}.
field_groups.personal_and_other: Child name, gender, religion, nationality, place and date of birth; father and mother names and religion/nationality; misc_notes for stamps or free text not fitting above.
